themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 9 verses. Commentary leans on "And Shaphan the scribe shewed the king, saying, Hilkiah the priest hath delivered me a book....". Cross references echo "Kingdom".
